data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. SHE'S A BEAUTY scored her maiden win here last start over 1200m after racing on the speed into the turn. Re-unites with Ryan Wiggins who was on board last start and dropping 4kg in weight looks ideally placed to go back-to-back. 3. STORM CAPITAL ran a solid race last time out when finishing second of 10 over 1000m at this track when sent out as the favourite. Is yet to miss the placings from four starts at this track and will be well fancied to go one better. 6. FONEELEVEN resumes from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Scored his debut win over 1000m at Bowen last prep and having placed in a recent trial has to be respected. 2. RONS FINEST CHOICE resumes from a spell following a last start third of eight over 1400m at Cairns after he raced on the speed into the turn. He has a 2kg claimer aboard and jumping from an inside draw is a must include in combinations.","runners":[7,3,6,2],"exclusive":true}
